top_signals.title: China's Solar Additions Drop 79% in April as Domestic Market Slumps
top_signals.summary: China installed much less solar power capacity in April from a year earlier as the domestic solar market continues to adjust to a change in policy following record-high installations and a major glut in recent years. Chinese developers added just 9.52 gigawatts (GW) of new solar power capacity last month, per official data from China's National Energy Administration cited by Bloomberg. The new capacity compares to the massive 45 GW solar expansion in April 2025, when companies rushed to install gigawatts ahead of a major policy change in the pricing…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Reddit stock drops almost 6% after Meta launches standalone app for online forums
top_signals.summary: Reddit shares fell after Meta released a standalone app for Facebook Groups called Forum.
